title: Protocol — DQ™ Red BSA Lysosomal Activity Assay  HCS Analysis
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"cjhio","text":"Functional readout of lysosomal proteolysis using self-quenched DQ™ Red BSA, followed by confocal imaging and spot-based quantification.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"54qcs","text":"- Acquire DAPI channel for nuclei and 568-nm channel for DQ-BSA signal (sequential acquisition).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"h0s5h","text":"- Use exposure settings similar to LysoTracker® acquisition; avoid saturation.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"xcgwg","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bxcs0","text":"Analysis — Harmony®/Columbus®","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":33}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"qqbmv","text":"- Find Nuclei on Hoechst channel; adjust thresholds to exclude debris/clumps.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"owcld","text":"- Find Cytoplasm using the 568 channel; apply intensity filter 200–100,000 a.u.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"laa2v","text":"- Find Spots on the 568 channel for DQ-BSA puncta; set split sensitivity 0.8 and detection sensitivity 0.5 (tune as needed).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8188x","text":"- Extract spot intensity metrics and normalise by nuclei count to obtain per-cell measures.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"sv8k8","text":"- Export per-well values for statistical analysis.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"ydjyf","text":"- Prepare DQ-BSA working solution at 10 µg/mL in complete medium (fresh).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fankk","text":"- Prepare Hoechst 33342 at 1 µg/mL.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"sua7s","text":"PFA is hazardous; use in a fume hood with appropriate PPE. Protect fluorescent probes from light.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"q1tho","text":"- DQ™ Red BSA (Life Technologies®, Cat# D12051)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"la3j5","text":"- Hoechst 33342 (ThermoFisher Scientific®, Cat# H3570)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"hcsh4","text":"- 4% Paraformaldehyde (PFA) in PBS (for fixation)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4gr8x","text":"- Complete medium; pre-warmed PBS","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bpscu","text":"- Imaging plates; Opera Phenix® Plus (RRID:SCR_021100)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"m28it","text":"- Harmony® High-Content Imaging \u0006 Analysis (RRID:SCR_018809)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Add DQ-BSA (final 10 µg/mL) to wells; incubate 37 °C for 1 h.
Wash gently with warm PBS to remove uninternalised probe.
Add Hoechst 33342 (final 1 µg/mL) for 5 min at 37 °C; wash with pre-warmed PBS.
Fix with 4% PFA (e.g., 10–15 min at RT); wash with PBS.
Acquire DAPI channel for nuclei and 568-nm channel for DQ-BSA signal (sequential acquisition).
Use exposure settings similar to LysoTracker® acquisition; avoid saturation.
Find Nuclei on Hoechst channel; adjust thresholds to exclude debris/clumps.
Find Cytoplasm using the 568 channel; apply intensity filter 200–100,000 a.u.
Find Spots on the 568 channel for DQ-BSA puncta; set split sensitivity 0.8 and detection sensitivity 0.5 (tune as needed).
Extract spot intensity metrics and normalise by nuclei count to obtain per-cell measures.
Export per-well values for statistical analysis.
Discrete cytoplasmic puncta with measurable 568-nm fluorescence proportional to proteolytic activity.
Low signal → confirm probe storage and working concentration; extend incubation to 2 h if needed.
Diffuse signal → reduce loading concentration or time; verify wash steps.
creator: Sara Lucas
